# Aliyun Operator Runbook — KB Go-Live Hotfix Upstream Commit

**Date:** 2026-05-15
**Quick ID:** 260515-cvh
**Author note:** Generated by Claude Code executor. Covers the 4 hotfixes applied by the vitaclaw-site go-live agent directly on Aliyun production. Origin/main now contains these fixes. Use this runbook to sync Aliyun.

---

## What changed

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `kb/static/qa.js` | Source chip link: `/article/` → `/articles/` + KB_BASE_PATH prefix; fallback state: `'fallback'` → `'fts5_fallback'` (2 sites) |
| `kb/static/search.js` | Extracted `buildSearchUrl` + `fetchSearch` helpers; cross-language retry on empty locale-filtered results |
| `kb/services/synthesize.py` | KG happy-path source chips and entity chips backfill via FTS fallback (75-line addition) |
| `kb/static/VitaClaw-Logo-v0.png` | UI-04 logo carry-forward |

**NOT changed (deferred to v2.1 backlog `kb-templates-index-hero-strip-migration`):**
- `kb/templates/index.html` — the hero-image-strip the go-live agent added directly to Aliyun's `index.html` is NOT in this commit. Template-side migration is a separate upcoming quick.

---

## PNG sha256 note (read before syncing the PNG)

| Copy | sha256 | Size |
|------|--------|------|
| Committed to origin/main (this commit) | `2c71bdf438045ea6c3511cb3722c1ac4673d427032571a36971fa5d0c2fc6f54` | 470KB, 2048×2048 RGBA |
| Aliyun production blob (current) | `3c827d3...` (first 7 chars) | ~1.3MB |

The two files are re-encoded but visually equivalent PNGs. If byte-identity matters to you (CDN caching, hash-based cache-bust), keep the existing Aliyun PNG and skip syncing it in both paths below.

---

## Path A — Hot-patch sync (PRESERVES Aliyun's hero-strip in index.html)

Use this path when the hero-strip on the homepage must be preserved.

**Pre-requisites:** SSH access to Aliyun server; `rsync` available on both sides.

### Step 1 — Pull origin/main on local dev machine

```bash
cd ~/OmniGraph-Vault
git pull origin main
```

### Step 2 — Rsync ONLY the 4 changed files

Sync only the code files. Do NOT run `kb/export_knowledge_base.py` (would overwrite Aliyun's `kb/output/index.html` and clobber the hero-strip).

```bash
# Replace <aliyun-user>@<aliyun-host> and <deploy-dir> with your values
rsync -avz \
  kb/services/synthesize.py \
  kb/static/qa.js \
  kb/static/search.js \
  kb/static/VitaClaw-Logo-v0.png \
  <aliyun-user>@<aliyun-host>:<deploy-dir>/
```

> **PNG note:** If you want to keep the existing Aliyun PNG (to avoid byte-identity diff), drop `kb/static/VitaClaw-Logo-v0.png` from the rsync list.

### Step 3 — Restart the KB service

```bash
ssh <aliyun-user>@<aliyun-host> "systemctl restart kb-service"
# OR if using uvicorn directly:
ssh <aliyun-user>@<aliyun-host> "pkill -f 'uvicorn kb.api' && cd <deploy-dir> && uvicorn kb.api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080 &"
```

### Step 4 — Verify source chip fix

1. Open `http://<aliyun-host>/kb/` in a browser
2. Navigate to the `/ask` page
3. Submit any question (e.g. "What is LangChain?")
4. When the answer appears, click a source chip
5. Expected URL pattern: `http://<host>/kb/articles/<hash>.html` (plural `articles/`, no `article/`)
6. The page should load without 404

### Step 5 — Verify fallback state CSS

1. With browser DevTools open, inspect `#qa-result`
2. After a fallback answer, confirm `data-qa-state="fts5_fallback"` (not `"fallback"`)

---

## Path B — Full re-export (ACCEPTS hero-strip loss)

Use this path when you want the cleanest, lowest-drift sync and are OK with the hero-strip disappearing from the homepage.

> **WARNING:** The hero-image-strip in `kb/output/index.html` on Aliyun (added by the go-live agent directly to the HTML) will be lost. This is a known regression. The template-side fix is tracked in v2.1 backlog `kb-templates-index-hero-strip-migration`. If hero-strip preservation is critical, use Path A instead.

### Step 1 — Pull origin/main on Aliyun

```bash
ssh <aliyun-user>@<aliyun-host>
cd <deploy-dir>
git pull origin main
```

### Step 2 — Re-run the SSG export driver

```bash
KB_DB_PATH=/path/to/prod/kol_scan.db \
KB_BASE_PATH=/kb \
.venv/bin/python kb/export_knowledge_base.py
```

This regenerates all files in `kb/output/` from templates. The templates do NOT contain the hero-strip, so it will be absent from the generated `index.html`.

### Step 3 — Restart the KB service

```bash
systemctl restart kb-service
# OR pkill + restart uvicorn as above
```

### Step 4 — Verify

Same as Path A Step 4 and 5 above.

---

## Recommendation

**Path B is the lower-risk-of-drift default** for operators who do not need hero-strip preservation. Every template change is reflected immediately; no risk of hot-patched file versions drifting from the DB.

**Path A** only if: (a) hero-strip is visible on the live site and users depend on it, AND (b) you can maintain the hot-patched file list manually between now and the v2.1 `kb-templates-index-hero-strip-migration` quick.

---

## Rollback

If either path causes unexpected issues:

```bash
# On Aliyun
git revert HEAD --no-edit
# OR git reset --hard <previous-commit-hash>
# Then restart service
```

The 4 hotfixes are isolated to `qa.js`, `search.js`, `synthesize.py`, and the PNG — no schema changes, no migration required.
